ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre or category of the book */,
  "total_copies" INTEGER /* Total number of copies in the library */,
  "available_copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies currently available */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Death date of the author (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowing_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being borrowed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Borrow, Return) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the borrowing period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the borrowing period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the borrowing (e.g., Active, Returned, Overdue) */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the book has been renewed */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Fine amount if the book is returned late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_records_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the user became a member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_borrowing" (
  "user_borrowing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user borrowing entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who borrowed the book */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrowing record */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for returning the book */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Actual return date of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_borrowing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_borrowing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES library_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_borrowing_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES borrowing_records ("record_id")
)
